2605.27333.title: FinHarness: An Inline Lifecycle Safety Harness for Finance LLM Agents
2605.27333.paper_summary: Finance LLM agents must simultaneously block prompt-induced unauthorized actions and approve legitimate multi-step business workflows. However, boundary filters often miss irreversible mid-trajectory tool calls, while post-hoc LLM judges perform auditing only after termination -- too late for intervention and at a computational cost that scales linearly with trace length. We present FinHarness, an inline safety harness that wraps a finance agent end-to-end with three components: a Query Monitor that fuses single-turn intent with cross-turn drift, a Tool Monitor that evaluates each prospective tool call, and a Cascade module that integrates per-step risk and adaptively routes verification between a lightweight and an advanced-tier LLM judge. Fired risk factors are re-injected into the agent input as ex-ante evidence, enabling the agent to refuse, re-plan, or approve on its own. On FinVault, routed FinHarness cuts ASR from 38.3% to 15.0% while largely preserving benign approval ($41.1\% \to 39.3\%$), and uses $4.7\times$ fewer advanced-judge calls than an always-advanced ablation.
2605.27333.paper_summary_zh: 金融 LLM 代理必須同時阻止由提示引起的未經授權行為並批准合法的多步業務工作流程。<lb/>然而，邊界過濾器經常錯過不可逆的中途工具調用，而事後 LLM 評估者僅在終止後進行審計——這對於干預來說太晚了，且計算成本與追蹤長度成線性增長。<lb/>我們提出了 FinHarness，一種內聯安全帶，將金融代理端到端包裹起來，包含三個組件：一個查詢監控器，將單輪意圖與跨輪漂移融合，<lb/>一個工具監控器，評估每個潛在的工具調用，以及一個級聯模塊，整合每步的風險並自適應地在輕量級和高級 LLM 評估者之間路由驗證。<lb/>觸發的風險因素被重新注入到代理輸入中，作為事前證據，使代理能夠拒絕、重新規劃或自行批准。<lb/>在 FinVault 上，路由的 FinHarness 將 ASR 從 38.3% 降至 15.0%，同時在很大程度上保留了良性批准（$41.1\% \to 39.3\%$），並使用比始終高級消融少 $4.7\times$ 的高級評估者調用。
2605.27333.author: Haoxuan Jia et.al.
2605.27333.authors: Haoxuan Jia, Yang Liu, Bin Chong, Yingguang Yang, Yancheng Chen, Jiayu Liang, Qian Li, Hanning Lu, Kefu Xu, Hao Zheng, Chongyang Zhang, Hao Peng, Philip S. Yu
